files.notes: This file contains the Editorial section followed by two Guide Lessons - one on Book of Mormon (Theology) and one on Genealogy. The file appears to cut off mid-sentence in the genealogy lesson about Canute going to England. There should be additional lessons (Work and Business, Home Economics) based on the table of contents, but they are not present in this file.
